business.name: Gill Fence LLC
business.tagline: Your property. Your privacy. Our craft.

hero.headline: *Built to last* — fences that stand strong in Jackson
hero.subheadline: Licensed installers who show up when we say we will and clean up when we're done.

services_section.label: WHAT WE BUILD
services_section.heading: Every fence type, done right
services_section.subheading: From privacy to security, residential to commercial

services.title: Privacy Fencing
services.description: Wood, vinyl, or composite. Full privacy screens that block sight lines and reduce noise.

services.title: Security Fencing
services.description: Chain link, ornamental iron, and commercial-grade barriers. Built for protection.

services.title: Decorative Fencing
services.description: Picket fences, garden borders, and accent features that add curb appeal.

services.title: Fence Repair
services.description: Storm damage, rot, or wear and tear. We fix what's broken and reinforce what's weak.

about.heading: Jackson fence installers
about.body: We're a Jackson fence team that measures twice and cuts once. Real people answering the phone — not a call center.

reviews.name: Mark C.
reviews.text: Fast response with reasonable quotes. They worked quickly with attention to detail and kept everything clean. Very friendly team.

reviews.name: Jamaul M.
reviews.text: Great company with integrity. I highly recommend to anyone.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving Jackson and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Local fence installation throughout central Mississippi

cta.heading: Ready for your new fence?
cta.body: Licensed Jackson installers with upfront pricing. No surprises, no hidden fees.
